settings.heading: Manufacturing
settings.body: End-to-end guidance on taking your design from concept to production. Pattern grading, material sourcing, factory communication, and quality control — built from years of hands-on experience.

settings.heading: Sampling
settings.body: Get your first sample right. We cover pattern development, fabric selection, construction techniques, and fit evaluation — so you're not wasting money on rounds of revisions.

settings.heading: Production
settings.body: Scaling from sample to production run. We consult on production planning, cost optimization, vendor management, and quality assurance to help you ship with confidence.
